title: OpportunityProposal v1
description: Canonical boundary object for proposing trade opportunities to the Execution Protocol. Submitted by any AI agent for policy validation and verification.

proposal_id.description: Unique identifier for this proposal. Format: prop_{timestamp}_{random}

session_id.description: Session identifier linking this proposal to an agent session. Obtained from POST /ep/session or generated by agent.

asset.description: Trading asset symbol. Must be in the allowed assets list of the target policy set.

amount_usd.description: Position size in USD. Must not exceed policy max_single_position.

entry_price.description: Proposed entry price for the asset.

leverage.description: Leverage multiplier. Must not exceed policy max_leverage. Default: 1

stop_loss.description: Stop loss price. Required if policy stop_loss_required is true.

take_profit.description: Take profit price. Required if policy take_profit_required is true.

rationale.description: Agent's reasoning for this trade proposal.
rationale.example: Conservative position below autonomy threshold to validate live execution pipeline

agent_id.description: Identifier of the submitting agent. Must match X-Agent-Key header.

policy_set_id.description: Policy set to validate against. Determines constraint rules.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for agent-specific use. Not validated by EP.

examples.rationale: First LIVE trade: Conservative position below autonomy threshold
